title: GabCraft19's Medieval Shortswords
body:
# GabCraft19's Medieval Shortswords  

## Description:  

GabCraft19's Medieval Shortswords is a weapon mod that adds a collection of historically inspired shortswords to Minecraft. These quick and versatile weapons are perfect for players who value agility and precision in combat, offering a fresh take on medieval weaponry.  

While this mod works as a standalone addition, it’s also part of the GabCraft19 series, ensuring compatibility with future mods for an expanded gameplay experience.  

## Features:  

- **Agile Shortswords**: Introduces a range of medieval-style shortswords, each crafted from various materials to suit different combat needs.  
- **Balanced Gameplay**: Combines quick attack speeds with moderate damage, ideal for fast and tactical encounters.  
- **Future Compatibility**: Designed to integrate smoothly with other GabCraft19 mods, expanding its functionality over time.  

Take on enemies with speed and precision using these expertly crafted medieval shortswords.  

**Found a bug or have feedback?** Join my **Discord server** to report issues for free. Your support keeps my mods alive and improving. Thank you for being part of the GabCraft19 community!
